location_notes: Samples from Medical Research Unit, Albert Schweitzer Hospital, Lambarene, Gabon. Coordinates approximate town centroid. This survey covers the 2002 in vitro surveillance study (Feb-Jun 2002), the only subset with extractable target-marker frequencies (n=34 genotyped for pfmdr1 86 and pfcrt 76).
time_notes: In vitro surveillance study conducted February 2002 to June 2002. Midpoint used as collection_day.
